## Verification

- [ ] Claims added/changed are tagged (`[verified]` / `[compiler-verified]` /
      `[field-tested]` / `[unverified]`) and **STATUS.md is updated in this PR**.
- [ ] `python3 tools/preflight.py examples/... --strict` passes for touched plugins.
- [ ] Code examples compile (`cmaj generate` / `cmaj test`) where applicable.
- [ ] Everything is in **English**; no project-specific names, IDs, or paths.
